title: Backrooms Through The Walls
description: Adds level 0, level 1, and the bacteria entity.
body:
Adds backrooms level 0 and 1, and the bacteria entity can be entered by no clipping. Level 0 has its own separate inventory, so you won't have any items and can't place any blocks. In level 1, you will have your items and be able to build and do whatever. Has a custom shader that auto-installs; you must apply it when in the dimension, as the shader is currently in a pretty broken state, but it still works. The shader base is Spooklementary. All images posted in here are of testing other shaders for possible future levels or what ever.

This mod is in beta and heavly buggy.
![Backrooms1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3509435eec83f21a646a54eb830fe4a14f84c3b4_0.webp)![Backrooms2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f88c2ae596631bb5e663b0441beb61372078b07_0.webp)![Backrooms3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14e22a89adf1f317ad6a687d77b684d487c75ae4_0.webp)
 

REQUIRES SODIUM AND IRIS SHADERS
